tasks.compile:linux: deno compile --allow-net --allow-env --allow-sys --allow-read --allow-run=netstat,df --include public/index.html --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --output dist/server-monitor-linux-x64 main.ts
tasks.compile:linux-arm: deno compile --allow-net --allow-env --allow-sys --allow-read --allow-run=netstat,df --include public/index.html --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --output dist/server-monitor-linux-arm64 main.ts
tasks.compile:windows: deno compile --allow-net --allow-env --allow-sys --allow-read --allow-run=netstat,df --include public/index.html --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output dist/server-monitor-windows-x64.exe main.ts
